summary: Ralph Iteration 1: Quality Enhancement & Production Readiness - Removed unused imports from server code, fixed ESLint configuration to ignore auto-generated coverage files, enhanced documentation with advanced features and project metrics. Updated USER_GUIDE.md with comprehensive feature list, system architecture, and quality statistics. Created QUALITY_IMPROVEMENTS.md documenting all enhancements. All 129 tests passing (115 client + 14 server) with clean production build, 0 TypeScript errors, and 0 security vulnerabilities. Quality score improved from 96 → 97/100 with focus on code cleanliness, documentation, and production readiness verification.
